title: MikroTik RouterBOARD cAPGi-5HaxD2HaxD, cAP ax
description: cAP ax is a design ceiling access point from MikroTik with support for the latest 802.11ax WiFi standard including older 802.11a/b/g/n/ac with transmission speeds 576 Mbps (2.4 GHz) + 1201 Mbps (5 GHz). The AP has been designed to blend in with the environment at the installation site as much as possible. It is ideal for use in establishments such as restaurants, hotels, airports, shopping centers, etc. The device offers 2 Gigabit LAN ports , enables power supply using a power adapter or PoE… Dual Band WiFi - 576 Mbps (2.4GHz) + 1201 Mbps (5GHz) 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax support High antenna gain - 5.5 dBi Support for 802.11r roaming and OWE/WPA3 encryption 2x Gigabit Ethernet with PoE IN and Out support 4-core CPU, 1800 MHz, 1024 MB RAM Power supply via DC jack and PoE 18 - 57V DC, 802.3af/at RouterOS level 4 Device Power adapter 48 V/0.95 A Gigabit PoE injector Mounting kit for attaching to the wall or ceiling
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ax, 802.11ac, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 1201 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3, OWE 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Antenna gain [dBi] 5,5 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 18 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE Out ports 1 Max. power consumption [W] 28 Power via connector/terminal 18 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Ceiling Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 228 Height [mm] 48 Depth [mm] 228 Hardware CPU IPQ-6010 CPU cores 4 Internal storage [MB] 128 RAM [MB] 1024
